name: 阿里云百炼AI
description: 阿里云百炼AI图片与视频生成、语音识别，支持千问文生图/图像编辑、万相文生图/图生视频/文生视频/视频编辑/参考生视频/首尾帧生视频/图生动作、可灵生图、图像扩图、声动人像、ASR语音识别（FunASR/Paraformer/Qwen-ASR）
description_zh: 阿里云百炼AI图片与视频生成、语音识别，支持千问文生图/图像编辑、万相文生图/图生视频/文生视频/视频编辑/参考生视频/首尾帧生视频/图生动作、可灵生图、图像扩图、声动人像、ASR语音识别（FunASR/Paraformer/Qwen-ASR）
description_en: Aliyun Bailian AI image & video generation and speech recognition. Supports Qwen text-to-image/image editing, Wan text-to-image/image-to-video/text-to-video/video editing/reference-to-video/first-last-frame-to-video/animate-move, Kling image generation, image outpainting, VideoRetalk, and ASR speech recognition (FunASR/Paraformer/Qwen-ASR).
